tool_args.label: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Committees

payload.title: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Committees Monday, May 22, 2023

tool_args.label: MTA Long Island Rail Road
tool_args.raw_text: The members of the Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR") Committee met jointly with the members of the Metro-North Committee.

tool_args.label: Catherine Rinaldi
tool_args.raw_text: Catherine Rinaldi – Interim President ... Catherine Rinaldi - President

payload.title: MTA Acting Assistant Deputy Chief Procurement Officer

payload.description: New vertical lift railroad bridge replacing the 127-year-old Walk Bridge on the Northeast Corridor, with two-track decks moving independently, higher vertical clearance, and faster speeds

Significant accessibility upgrades at nine LIRR stations including new/replaced elevators, sidewalk and path of travel improvements, structural and architectural improvements, lighting, signage and electrical enhancements

New pathway with two escalators and an elevator in Grand Central's Biltmore Room connecting to Grand Central Madison, providing LIRR customers with direct escalator and elevator access between GCM and Grand Central Terminal's Main Concourse
450-space parking lot near Croton Falls station with EV chargers for up to 10 cars and room for additional 250 cars, new sidewalks and lighting along Croton Falls Road

tool_args.label: Laser Tribology Lease for Railhead Cleaning

payload.project_name: Laser Tribology BV Lease for Railhead Cleaning
payload.description: Non-competitive negotiated miscellaneous service contract for lease of laser modules for railhead-based cleaning to remove leaf debris and contaminants from rail surfaces

Coordinated weekday train and shuttle bus service between Speonk and Montauk with $3.25 flat fare; resumed summer Friday service for first time since 2019 debut; operating year-round beginning May 26, 2023

Rebranding five select locomotives with special colors and designs celebrating Metro-North's 40th anniversary; first locomotive (208) wrapped in original silver, blue and red design; first three pay homage to FL9 locomotives from 1983 founding until 2007
Metro-North shattered its one-day post-pandemic ridership record, breaking through the 200,000 ceiling for the first time since March 6, 2020

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.
